visibility.title: Privacy & Visibility
visibility.age_description: Adjusts content based on age group.

image_proxy.title: Image proxy
image_proxy.description: Choose how thumbnails and images are loaded on this device.
image_proxy.helper_none: No proxy is active. Images use the original URLs published on the network.
image_proxy.helper_imgproxy: Uses the imgproxy format: /insecure/... with client-generated transformations.
image_proxy.helper_nostube_imgproxy: Uses the nostube-imgproxy imgproxy-compatible API: /insecure/.../plain/encoded-URL, including thumbnails derived from videos through FFmpeg.
image_proxy.helper_imageproxy: Uses the imageproxy format: /options/remote-url to resize through the server.

cors_proxy.title: CORS proxy
cors_proxy.description: Configure an HTTPS proxy for external requests that block CORS.
cors_proxy.helper_custom: Use an HTTPS URL for a compatible cors-anywhere server.
cors_proxy.helper_corsproxy_io: Uses https://corsproxy.io with the target URL encoded.

presets.title: Presets
presets.description: Choose a curated configuration for relays, filters, and auxiliary servers.
presets.noPresetsDescription: We did not find presets on the configured relays.
presets.cacheNotice: Preset loaded from local cache. Refreshing in the background.
presets.errorDescription: We kept your current configuration to avoid affecting navigation.
presets.personalSettingsSafe: Your personal settings will not be erased.
presets.availableDescription: Presets published as NIP-78 events on connected relays.
presets.fallbackDescription: No active preset was loaded. The app keeps your current settings.
presets.partialWarning: Part of this preset was ignored because it contains invalid values.
presets.selectError: Could not load this preset. We kept your current configuration.
presets.refreshError: Could not refresh presets right now.

relays.title: Relay relays
relays.description: Selected relays appear first and are synced immediately with the client.
relays.dialog_description: Use only `wss://` URLs. The relay will be saved to your local list and synced immediately with the client pool.
relays.error_insecure: Insecure ws:// relays are not accepted. Use only wss://.
relays.error_invalid: Enter a valid relay starting with wss://.

profile.title: Creator Profile
profile.description: Your public information on the Nostr network.
profile.bio_placeholder: Tell us a bit about yourself

account.title: Account & Security
account.description: Manage your session and account preferences.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.comments_description: Alerts for replies on your videos.
notifications.zaps_description: Notify when you receive a Zap.
notifications.subscriptions_description: New videos from creators you follow.
notifications.weekly_description: Email or notification with weekly summary.

player.title: Player & Upload
player.thumbnail_mode_description: Global preference used in the upload screen and URL import.
player.thumbnail_mode_local_desc: Tries to generate in the browser first. Falls back to ffmpeg.wasm if available.
player.thumbnail_mode_remote_desc: Uses a DVM to generate thumbnails from the published/imported video source.

configuration.title: Settings
configuration.description: Customize your account, experience and integrations on NostrTube.
configuration.sidebar_tips_desc: Small habits to strengthen your presence.
configuration.sidebar_tips_relays: Configure at least 3 relays for redundancy.
configuration.sidebar_tips_blossom: Use Blossom mirrors to distribute your media.
configuration.sidebar_tips_zaps: Enable Zap notifications so you never miss support.
configuration.sidebar_presence_desc: Share content and connect with the community.
configuration.zaps_error: Could not load your Zaps right now.
configuration.zaps_login_desc: Sign in to see your Zaps.
configuration.dm_relays_description: Publish your preferred relay list for DM via NIP-17.
configuration.dm_relays_help: This helps other clients discover where to deliver private messages to your account.
configuration.dm_relays_error: Failed to publish DM relay list.

page.loading_description: Syncing local preferences and platform options.
